Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W2071P256444

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:Washable mat spray mop - superfine fiber mop with 300ML reusable bottle, suitable for wood, hardwood, laminate, ceramic tile, etc

Main Color:Blue

Main Material:Plastic,Steel

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):14.50

Assembled Width (in.):3.90

Assembled Height (in.):50.00

Weight (lbs.):1.93

Package Size

Length (in.):23.00

Width (in.):2.75

Height (in.):6.29

Weight (lbs.):2.54

Product Features

  • This microfiber spray mop for flooring can be used as both wet mop and dry mop. It uses the magic of microfiber to absorb the smallest dirt and dust.
  • Reusable mop, simply press the trigger on the reinforced wood floor handle mop to evenly convert water into mist, saving water and making it more labor-saving and efficient than ordinary wet mops.
  • 360 degree rotation makes it easy to clean dead corners, such as sofas, wardrobes, or under beds.
  • A bottle of water can clean 200 square meters, fully meeting your needs.
